data: Group Discussion - Work Pressure vs. Work-Life Balance
Group Discussion - Work Pressure vs. Work-Life Balance
Learn how to discuss work pressure and work-life balance in a group discussion

message:
Hey! Today we're learning how to discuss Work Pressure vs. Work-Life Balance in a group discussion.

Using the right structure helps you speak clearly and confidently.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/ac97b412-5884-4fb6-82c6-42597079df71-GD---v2-(1).jpg 
button_text: Cool!

message:
When you want to talk about what something offers or contributes, use this structure:

"[Topic] offers [advantage]."

For example: "Work pressure offers higher motivation and better productivity."
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/ac97b412-5884-4fb6-82c6-42597079df71-GD---v2-(1).jpg 
button_text: Got it!

message:
Here's another example.

If someone asks about the benefits of work-life balance, you can say:

"Work-life balance offers better health and personal well-being."
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/ac97b412-5884-4fb6-82c6-42597079df71-GD---v2-(1).jpg 
button_text: Next!

message:
When you want to mention both the advantage and the drawback, use this structure:

"While [topic] offers [advantage], it also has a [drawback]."

For example: "While work pressure offers faster results, it also has a risk of stress and burnout."
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/ac97b412-5884-4fb6-82c6-42597079df71-GD---v2-(1).jpg 
button_text: Makes sense!

message:
Let's practice discussing work pressure vs. work-life balance!

image_url:
button_text: Start Practice!

Select the correct way to talk about what work pressure offers

1.Work pressure offers higher motivation and better productivity.
2.Work pressure is always harmful and should be avoided.

Correct answer: 1

Select the correct way to talk about the drawback of work-life balance

1.Work-life balance means employees do not work hard enough.
2.While work-life balance offers well-being, it also has a risk of slower career growth.

Correct answer: 2
Work pressure offers a stronger sense of accountability in the workplace.
While work pressure offers quick growth, it also has the challenge of reducing creativity.
Work-life balance offers a healthier and more focused approach to work.
While work-life balance offers personal happiness, it also has the risk of missing urgent deadlines.
Work pressure offers a chance to demonstrate performance under challenging conditions.

first_message: That was incredible! Now we're going to practice by answering few questions in English. Can we start?
prompt_id: 4d3f5213-fcc4-40f3-879d-051908377a31
questions: "'1. What does work pressure offer to an employee? Use Structure 1.'

'2. While work pressure offers productivity, what risk does it also bring? Respond using Structure 2.'

'3. What does work-life balance offer to an employee? Use Structure 1.'

'4. While work-life balance offers better health, what challenge does it also bring? Give your answer using Structure 2.'

'5. What does work pressure offer to career growth? Use Structure 1.'"
